items.title: Gotta get my annually grinds my gears summer league post out of the way. I can understand interviewing people, but for the 9 of us focused on the game, show the live game in full screen and have a graphic in the corner saying Kyshawn George is speaking. Then during non live play
items.author: Hoop Informatics
items.body_excerpt: Gotta get my annually grinds my gears summer league post out of the way. I can understand interviewing people, but for the 9 of us focused on the game, show the live game in full screen and have a graphic in the corner saying Kyshawn George is speaking. Then during non live play show full interview

images.alt: screenshot of the NBA summer league game picture and picture with an interview with Kyshawn George during live play where the the viewing window of the game is about 50% what it typically is

items.title: [Joshua Robbins] The Wizards envision Trae Young playing off ball to allow AJ Dybantsa and Kyshawn George to handle guard duties.
items.author: oklolzzzzs
items.body_excerpt: The Wizards’ professed vision for Young in the season ahead includes him playing off the ball and allowing youngsters such as Dybantsa and George to handle the basketball. But when Washington finds itself in close games, it can count on Young to bring the ball upcourt, make…
